title: So crazy try
description: For recipes, this mod adds more interesting recipes and items!
body:
I'm sorry, but the author's native language is not English, so please understand the translation errors.
thanks

#
"so crazy try" is a medium-sized mod that supports version 1.20.1Forge. It optimizes the complexity of Minecraft crafting method and makes crafting easier!

![About how the "Totem of Undying" is crafted](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82108a66c8b4fcc408c488455de2983a134ae99a.png)

# **_The modifications made by the mod_**
- Modified and added some original Minecraft recipes
- Added some items to make crafting more natural
- Progressions have been added to make crafting more challenging!

## _Download_
The official Chinese forum for the module: [ Click to enter](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/18083.html)
